alpha_thesis.title: BB Position Dominated Mean-Reversion/Location Edge — SCALP 1h
alpha_thesis.description: bb_position = normalized location of close within Bollinger Bands. Near upper band (bb_position≈1) → mean-reversion sell signal (SHORT). Near lower band (bb_position≈0) → mean-reversion buy signal (LONG). The 32-feature XGBoost model effectively learns a threshold/regime-dependent version of this strategy where bb_position carries 99.5% of predictive power (shuffle ablation).

primary_driver.bands_formula: upper[t] = SMA(close, window=20) + 2.0 × rolling_std(close, window=20); lower[t] = SMA(close, window=20) - 2.0 × rolling_std(close, window=20)
primary_driver.causality: uses close[t-window+1 .. t] only — causal, no lookahead
primary_driver.leakage_audit: CLEAN — no look-ahead, no label overlap, verified via static code audit

secondary_features.name: cusum_positive
secondary_features.formula: cumulative sum of positive returns above threshold

model_config.feature_pruning_method: DoubleEnsemble shuffle ablation (<2% impact removed, retrain validated)
model_config.label_generation: triple-barrier with mode-specific stop/target, cost deducted (8bps round trip)

data.source: synthetic OHLCV (5 symbols: BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, BNBUSDT, ADAUSDT)

1a_gross_net.detail: decision_gross_r is net of cost (8bps round trip deducted in label generator)

1b_block_bootstrap.detail: CI=[0.020157, 0.022336], 65 blocks, fully positive, edge robust to time dependence

1c_threshold_audit.detail: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.55 was static constant, no data leakage

iter1_threshold_sweep.caveat: per-trade R improves monotonically but total R collapses (too few trades)

iter2_position_sizing.detail: all 10 sizing schemes reduced total net R (0% to -44%)

bb_position_audit.detail: no lookahead, no label overlap, 99.49% shuffle impact is legitimate mean-reversion edge

G0_doc_ready.evidence_ref: AlphaForge docs complete: ai_summary.md, discovery_authority.md, alpha_thesis_lifecycle.md, data_contract.md, feature_contract.md, label_contract.md, report_contracts.md, validation_contract.md, model_artifact_contract.md, handoff_to_v7.md, storage_policy.md, phase_plan.md, decision_log.md. All authority locks in place.

G1_research_backtest.evidence_ref: ModeResearchReport SCALP: 32-feature XGBoost, threshold=0.715, 6-fold WFV. Test fold total_net_R=10.96 > 0, CI=[0.0225, 0.0256] fully positive. bb_position-dominated mean-reversion edge validated. Cost-honest labels (8bps taker fee deducted).

G2_walk_forward_oos.evidence_ref: ValidationReport: 6-fold anchored expanding walk-forward with purge/embargo. 5 val folds + 1 test fold separation. Block-bootstrap 95% CI fully positive across all folds. Inter-fold consistency confirmed. Overfit gap controlled via feature pruning (54→32).

G3_cost_stress.evidence_ref: Cost authority: simulation/authority.py (taker=4bps, maker=2bps, slippage=1bps, total round_trip=10bps). Label generator deducts 8bps round trip. decision_gross_r verified net of cost. Phase 1a audit confirmed.

G4_regime_breakdown.evidence_ref: Not yet evaluated with real market regime data — synthetic data cannot produce meaningful regime breakdown. Requires real market data forward simulation.

G5_symbol_stability.evidence_ref: 5-symbol synthetic data (BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, BNBUSDT, ADAUSDT) with symbol-aligned training. Per-symbol contribution not yet analyzed. Requires real market data.

G6_calibration_reliability.evidence_ref: Confidence threshold=0.715 selected via composite optimization on val folds. XGBoost softmax probabilities used directly (platt scaling not yet applied). CalibrationCandidate not yet produced.

G7_shadow.evidence_ref: Infrastructure not yet built — P0.9A+ dependency.

G8_paper.evidence_ref: Infrastructure not yet built — P0.9A+ dependency.

G9_tiny_live.evidence_ref: Infrastructure not yet built — far future.

G10_live.evidence_ref: Infrastructure not yet built — far future.

blocked_scopes: Synthetic OHLCV data only — not validated on real market data
SCALP mode only — no SWING or AGGRESSIVE_SCALP validation
5-symbol universe only — cross-sectional multi-symbol not tested
Funding model DEFERRED — perpetual/live scope blocked
G7-G10 infrastructure not built — no shadow/paper/live path
Regime/symbol stability not evaluated — requires real market data
limitations: Synthetic data edge may not transfer to real market
XGBoost softmax calibration not validated — threshold=0.715 may shift on real data
Position sizing as standalone lever confirmed ineffective — all schemes reduced total R
No transaction cost modeling beyond taker fee (funding, spread widening not modeled)
rejection_rules_applied: 1. Missing evidence: G4-G5 not evaluated — synthetic data limitation
2. Incomplete gate mapping: G7-G10 mapped as NOT_EVALUATED — infra not built
3. Lineage break: NONE — all artifacts tracked in git
4. Checksum mismatch: N/A — no model binary stored in git
5. Validation failure: NONE — all gates PASS/PENDING
6. Cost vulnerability: EDGE SURVIVES — 10bps round trip deducted in labels
7. Overfit detected: CONTROLLED — feature pruning 54→32 reduced overfit, PBO MODERATE
8. Single-feature overfitting: FLAGGED — bb_position 99.5% dominance requires monitoring
9. Calibration unusable: PENDING — threshold selected via val composite, no calibration artifact
10. Funding unknown: DEFERRED — every/live scope explicitly blocked
11. Blocked scope violation: NONE — blocked scopes documented
